measured.transcript: Today is Wednesday, May the third, two thousand six. The time is approximately eight thirty three PM The location is twenty eight eleven West Main Street, Casper, Wyoming. My name is Greg Irwin, video specialist of legal video of Wyoming, located at 350 Katie Lane, Casper, Wyoming. This is case number 598-6369, filed in the district court in Toronto County, Wyoming, 8th Judicial District, entitled TRZ Corporation versus Max The deponent is Paul Frazier. The video deposition is requested by John Spencer, attorney for the defense. The court reporter is Dorothy Bunn of Dor of Bunn and Associates. Counsel and all present will please identify themselves for the record. John Spencer representing the Max Mutual Insurance Company. Witness may be sworn in. Will there be opening remarks before I swore the witness? No. you mind if your witness does not stand to be sworn? No, I do not. Sir, do you solemnly swear from the testimony you're about to give today'll be the truth, the whole truth, and nothing but the truth under of law I do thank you or on the record Fraser, my name is John Spencer. I'll be asking you a series of questions in regard to your knowledge as to the operations of the TRZ plant, which will have a bearing on the outcome I will ask you to wait to answer until the entire question has been asked, then you answer verbally, as the court reporter cannot record your I will also wait until you have answered the question prior to speaking in response to your answers, as she cannot record two conversations at the same time. Fraser, is there any reason that you cannot fulfill your obligations No. you taking any medicine that could affect your ability to answer my questions today. No. Thank you. Now let me advise you that you are under oath and you're to answer every question to the best of your ability And as accurately as possible. If you do not understand the question, please ask me to explain it further and I'll be happy to do so. If you cannot answer a question accurately, then we are entitled to your best estimate. that clear? Yes. Now will you please state your full name and address for the record? Paul Robert Frazier, 49 South Third Street, Douglas, Wyoming. how long have you lived there? About fifteen years. We moved there when I went to work for the TRZ corporation. How old are you, Mr Fraser? you married, Mr. Fraser? Yes, to the same woman for twenty seven years. Do you have any children? Objection, irrelevant. You may answer, Mr. Fraser. Um Yes, we have three, two boys and a girl, but uh they're all married and live elsewhere. So Mr. Frazier, what is your educational background? I graduated from high school in Boston and went to RPI. I got a BS in geophysics in 1975. Since then I took several postgraduate courses and received my master's from the University of Wyoming five years later. And when did you join the TRZ Corporation? I believe it was in the fall of 1990. What was your position at that time? I was a project engineer. was your position when you left TRZ? I was chief engineer and head of the engineering department. What year was that? Two thousand and four. How long had you been in that position? For about the last five years of my employment. In that position, Mr. Fraser, were you responsible for the proper treatment and disposal of the waste material that came from the manufacturing process? I I drew up the specifications for the treatment, but I was not responsible for the procedures. Who would have been responsible for the final disposition of the waste? That would have been the head of the waste management department. who would have been responsible to see to it that the head of that department was properly following your waste treatment procedure. assume that would have been the plant's general manager. Do you know who that might have been? No, there were several different employees that held that position over the years. Yes, I do believe he held that position I'd like to request that we go off the record at this time so that I may uh take this phone call. is approximately 838 p.m. We are back on the record the time is approximately 841 Okay. Mr. Fraser, do you consider yourself as an expert in your field? Objection. Mr. not here as an expert witness. He's a previous employee who's been called on to testify as to his knowledge of the subject of this lawsuit and nothing more. Mr. Fraser, please answer the question. Well, I don't work in that field anymore, so no, I would not consider myself to be an expert. Well
